description: Letter addressed to a certain Abu Ibrahim Ishaq, dated in the month of Marheshvan (the rest of the date is missing), and mentioning equipment of a weaver's shop, including components of a loom. The author also conveys personal regards from Yeshu'a and Musa.
description_he: מכתב לאבו אברהים יצחק בחשון, מזכיר ציוד מגוף אורגים ומרכיבי נול
